IE.S: [Path, C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Bandizip\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Links;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;D:\微信web开发者工具\dll;C:\Program Files\CMake\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\;C:\Users\12202\.local\bin;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\codegraph\current\bin;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm\bin;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm\bin;D:\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\bin]

En.S: C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Bandizip\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Links;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;D:\微信web开发者工具\dll;C:\Program Files\CMake\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\;C:\Users\12202\.local\bin;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\codegraph\current\bin;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm\bin;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm;C:\Users\12202\AppData\Local\pnpm\bin;D:\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\bin
